response.justification: Candidate meets the 15-year minimum experience requirement with 20 years spanning multiple domains and an MIT education, plus recent direct involvement in AI-agent infrastructure. However, the role explicitly requires recognized AI expertise with demonstrated products or platforms, neither of which is evident; the MCP work is too recent (April 2025) to establish domain depth, and the resume lacks a Master's/PhD in AI, published research, or leadership evidence at the strategic director level the role demands.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience exceeds minimum requirement
Current role includes hands-on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP work directly aligned with role focus
Demonstrated ability to learn across diverse technical domains (web, mobile, embedded, GIS, infrastructure)
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field, explicitly stated as preferred qualification
AI experience is too recent (started April 2025) to claim recognized expertise; no demonstrated products or platforms built with AI
Limited evidence of director-level strategic leadership, technical advisory to customers, or cloud platform strategy work

key_factors.factor: Missing established AI expertise and products
Meets 15-year experience minimum with strong technical foundation
Recent MCP and AI-agent infrastructure work
